news.title:
SBFC Finance Ltd paid Rs. 18 cr interest and Rs. 200 cr principal for NCDs on 4th March 2026.
The redemption was full, covering 20,000 NCDs, and no outstanding amount remains.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Ltd paid Rs. 18 cr interest and Rs. 200 cr principal for NCDs on 4th March 2026.
The redemption was full, covering 20,000 NCDs, and no outstanding amount remains.

news.title:
India Ratings affirmed stable ratings for SBFC Finance's pass-through certificates.
Senior tranche rated IND AA(SO) and Equity tranche rated IND BBB(SO).
news.summary:
India Ratings affirmed stable ratings for SBFC Finance's pass-through certificates.
Senior tranche rated IND AA(SO) and Equity tranche rated IND BBB(SO).

news.title:
SBFC Finance Ltd confirms Rs.36 crore interest payment for NCDs (ISIN INE423Y07120) on Feb 4, 2026.
Interest paid net of Rs.5.4 crore withholding tax; deposited per Income Tax Act provisions.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Ltd confirms Rs.36 crore interest payment for NCDs (ISIN INE423Y07120) on Feb 4, 2026.
Interest paid net of Rs.5.4 crore withholding tax; deposited per Income Tax Act provisions.

news.title:
SBFC Finance reported Q3 FY26 results, showing a 29% YoY growth in AUM to INR 10,478 crore, with 81% in MSME loans and 19% in gold loans. PAT rose 34% YoY to INR 118 crore.
The company expects FY26 AUM growth of 5-7% QoQ with stable or hardening interest rates. Aseem Dhru transitions to Non-Executive Vice Chairman, while Mahesh Dayani assumes leadership as MD.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance reported Q3 FY26 results, showing a 29% YoY growth in AUM to INR 10,478 crore, with 81% in MSME loans and 19% in gold loans. PAT rose 34% YoY to INR 118 crore.
The company expects FY26 AUM growth of 5-7% QoQ with stable or hardening interest rates. Aseem Dhru transitions to Non-Executive Vice Chairman, while Mahesh Dayani assumes leadership as MD.

news.title:
SBFC Fin reports a 14% drop in disbursements.
The company's gross NPA decreased by 6 bps QoQ.
news.summary:
SBFC Fin reports a 14% drop in disbursements.
The company's gross NPA decreased by 6 bps QoQ.

news.title:
SBFC Finance announced leadership changes: Aseem Dhru resigns as MD & CEO effective 31st March 2026, re-designated as Vice Chairman from 1st April 2026.
Mahesh Dayani appointed as MD & CEO for a five-year term starting 1st April 2026; Chief Collections Officer Sai Prashant Menon resigns effective 31st January 2026.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance announced leadership changes: Aseem Dhru resigns as MD & CEO effective 31st March 2026, re-designated as Vice Chairman from 1st April 2026.
Mahesh Dayani appointed as MD & CEO for a five-year term starting 1st April 2026; Chief Collections Officer Sai Prashant Menon resigns effective 31st January 2026.

news.title:
SBFC Finance's Q3 FY26 PAT rose 34% YoY to ₹118 crore, AUM grew 29% YoY to ₹10,478 crore.
Gross NPA stood at 2.7% with 46.2% provision cover; cost to AUM improved to 3.9%.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance's Q3 FY26 PAT rose 34% YoY to ₹118 crore, AUM grew 29% YoY to ₹10,478 crore.
Gross NPA stood at 2.7% with 46.2% provision cover; cost to AUM improved to 3.9%.

news.title:
SBFC Finance reported Q3 net profit of ₹1,180M, up from ₹881M YoY.
Interest income rose to ₹3,973M in Q3; sufficient security cover for NCDs.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance reported Q3 net profit of ₹1,180M, up from ₹881M YoY.
Interest income rose to ₹3,973M in Q3; sufficient security cover for NCDs.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed SBFC Finance's bank facilities and commercial paper ratings.
Ratings are based on FY25 audited and H1FY26 unaudited performance; no changes noted.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed SBFC Finance's bank facilities and commercial paper ratings.
Ratings are based on FY25 audited and H1FY26 unaudited performance; no changes noted.

news.title:
SBFC Finance Ltd confirms payment of Rs. 1.39 crore interest on NCDs on 20 Jan 2026.
The payment, linked to ISIN INE423Y07138, adheres to SEBI LODR regulations as per compliance norms.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Ltd confirms payment of Rs. 1.39 crore interest on NCDs on 20 Jan 2026.
The payment, linked to ISIN INE423Y07138, adheres to SEBI LODR regulations as per compliance norms.

news.title: Tata AIA Life and Temasek acquired a 1.4% stake in SBFC Finance for Rs 161 crore.
news.summary: Tata AIA Life and Temasek acquired a 1.4% stake in SBFC Finance for Rs 161 crore.

news.title:
SBFC Finance Ltd disclosed Crisil's reaffirmed AAA(SO) credit rating for Series A PTCs.
Rating pertains to PTCs backed by LAP receivables from Prime Trust March 2019.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Ltd disclosed Crisil's reaffirmed AAA(SO) credit rating for Series A PTCs.
Rating pertains to PTCs backed by LAP receivables from Prime Trust March 2019.

news.title:
SBFC Finance confirms interest payment of Rs. 1.42 Cr on NCDs issued under ISIN INE423Y07138.
Payment due on 20-11-2025 was made on time with no delays reported.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance confirms interest payment of Rs. 1.42 Cr on NCDs issued under ISIN INE423Y07138.
Payment due on 20-11-2025 was made on time with no delays reported.

news.title:
SBFC Finance AUM crossed Rs.10,000 cr, growing 29% YoY, 6% QoQ, ROE at 14%, ROA above 4.5%.
Credit cost rose to 1.3%, PCR at 46%, focus on loans >Rs.7L, AUM QoQ growth guidance at 5-7%.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance AUM crossed Rs.10,000 cr, growing 29% YoY, 6% QoQ, ROE at 14%, ROA above 4.5%.
Credit cost rose to 1.3%, PCR at 46%, focus on loans >Rs.7L, AUM QoQ growth guidance at 5-7%.

news.title:
SBFC Finance approved ESOP Policy 2025 with 12.1 crore options, pending shareholder nod.
Internal Auditor resigned; Head of Credit also stepped down. New Chief Credit Officer appointed with 29 years' experience.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance approved ESOP Policy 2025 with 12.1 crore options, pending shareholder nod.
Internal Auditor resigned; Head of Credit also stepped down. New Chief Credit Officer appointed with 29 years' experience.

news.title:
SBFC Finance's Q2 FY26 PAT rose 30% YoY to ₹109 crore; AUM grew 29% YoY to ₹9,938 crore.
Gross NPA stood at 2.8%, provision coverage at 46.2%, cost-to-AUM ratio improved to 4.4%.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance's Q2 FY26 PAT rose 30% YoY to ₹109 crore; AUM grew 29% YoY to ₹9,938 crore.
Gross NPA stood at 2.8%, provision coverage at 46.2%, cost-to-AUM ratio improved to 4.4%.

news.title:
SBFC Finance Q2 GNPA decreased to 2.8% from 2.8%, QoQ.
Q2 NNPA improved to 1.5% against 1.6%, QoQ.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Q2 GNPA decreased to 2.8% from 2.8%, QoQ.
Q2 NNPA improved to 1.5% against 1.6%, QoQ.

news.title: SBFC Finance posts Q2 net profit of ₹1.09B, up from ₹840M YoY.
news.summary: SBFC Finance posts Q2 net profit of ₹1.09B, up from ₹840M YoY.

news.title:
SBFC Finance Ltd's board to discuss Employee Stock Option Policy on Nov 1, 2025.
Meeting details uploaded on SBFC's investor website; shareholder approval required.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Ltd's board to discuss Employee Stock Option Policy on Nov 1, 2025.
Meeting details uploaded on SBFC's investor website; shareholder approval required.

news.title:
SBFC Finance Ltd confirms Rs.1.38 cr interest payment on NCDs as per SEBI LODR regulations.
Payment made on 20th Oct 2025, matching record date 3rd Oct 2025; no delays reported.
news.summary:
SBFC Finance Ltd confirms Rs.1.38 cr interest payment on NCDs as per SEBI LODR regulations.
Payment made on 20th Oct 2025, matching record date 3rd Oct 2025; no delays reported.
